long_description:
NRE were alerted of link errors incrementing between bcs180b.sr02.dal12 Port-Channel999 <-> bas05a.sr02.dal12 Port-Channel9. Raising this INC to track progress.

Short Description: INC10480913 | bcs180b.sr02.dal12 Et50/1 <-> bas05b.sr02.dal12 Et22/1 | Link Errors
Outage Start: 2025-12-05 08:34:20 UTC
Outage End: 
Severity: 4
Source of detection: monitoring

https://github.ibm.com/IaaS-NRE/nreincidents/issues/19789
short_description: bcs180b.sr02.dal12 Et50/1 <-> bas05b.sr02.dal12 Et22/1 | Link Errors
close_notes: Link shut to mitigate any further impact. Will proceed to do Layer1 troubleshooting to resolve any issues with the link before adding it back to service. (Note: This incident was resolved via one-touch automation.)
